HGSS.065.0000:
We have recordings of the cries of many
of the Pokémon that have been found.\f
We must have about 200 kinds.
HGSS.065.0001:
To Trainers, Pokémon are their
beloved partners.\f
It’s terrible how Team Rocket is trying
to control Pokémon.
HGSS.065.0002:
We run 24 hours a day to broadcast
entertaining programs.\f
I’ll do my best to run around the
clock, too!
HGSS.065.0003:
The Team Rocket boss has locked
himself in.\f
But the Director can open it.\f
He’s up on the fifth floor.
Please save him!
HGSS.065.0005:
Thank you, kiddo! You’re the best!
This is a token of my appreciation.\f
HGSS.065.0007:
It’s Sunny Day.
It powers up Fire-type moves for\r
a while.
HGSS.065.0010:
The door is locked...
You need a Card Key.
HGSS.065.0013:
You should be able to unlock the door
with the Card Key!
